suite.name: Signup

test.name: Deve poder cadastrar um novo usuário

kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\marce\\OneDrive\\Documentos\\PROJETOS\\pb-compass\\Sprint_07\\QAx\\projects\\mark85-robot-express\\logs\\browser\\traces\\temp\\0c6c9c47-ca4b-4b70-b0ac-364c8bfb12d2"}
Starting Browser process C:\Users\marce\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\Lib\site-packages\Browser\wrapper\index.js using at 127.0.0.1:12038

Successfully created browser with options: {"browser":"chromium","headless":false,"chromiumSandbox":false,"devtools":false,"handleSIGHUP":true,"handleSIGINT":true,"handleSIGTERM":true,"slowMo":0,"timeout":30000,"tracesDir":"C:\\Users\\marce\\OneDrive\\Documentos\\PROJETOS\\pb-compass\\Sprint_07\\QAx\\projects\\mark85-robot-express\\logs\\browser\\traces\\temp\\0c6c9c47-ca4b-4b70-b0ac-364c8bfb12d2"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:3000
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: ${user} = {'name': 'Teste CT001', 'email': 'ct001@mail.com', 'password': 'pwd123'}
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Remove user from database
kw.msg: REMOVE USER BY ct001@mail.com REMOVIDO COM SUCESSO!!.

kw.name: Go To
kw.msg: Successfully opened URL http://localhost:3000/signup
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector xpath=//h1 at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: Text: 'Faça seu cadastro'
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'Teste CT001' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'ct001@mail.com' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'pwd123' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'css=[type=submit] >> text=Cadastrar'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Notice should be
Set Variable
kw.msg: ${element} = css=.notice p
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=.notice p at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: Text: 'Boas vindas ao Mark85, o seu gerenciador de tarefas.'
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.arg: Boas vindas ao Mark85, o seu gerenciador de tarefas.

kw.name: Take Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current window or element and saves it to disk.

test.name: Não deve permitir o cadastro com email duplicado

kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: Switching browser to browser=ba47293c-8aa6-4210-b747-62fa971d893d
Successfully changed active browser: browser=ba47293c-8aa6-4210-b747-62fa971d893d
Reusing existing browser with id: browser=ba47293c-8aa6-4210-b747-62fa971d893d
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:3000
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: ${user} = {'name': 'Teste CT002', 'email': 'ct002@mail.com', 'password': 'pwd123'}
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Remove user from database
kw.msg: REMOVE USER BY ct002@mail.com REMOVIDO COM SUCESSO!!.

kw.name: Insert user from database
kw.msg: USER {'name': 'Teste CT002', 'email': 'ct002@mail.com', 'password': 'pwd123', '_id': ObjectId('68d08e1b7eab9b7c6215c532')} INSERIDO COM SUCESSO!!.

kw.name: Go To
kw.msg: Successfully opened URL http://localhost:3000/signup
kw.doc: Navigates to the given ``url``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector xpath=//h1 at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: Text: 'Faça seu cadastro'
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'Teste CT002' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'ct002@mail.com' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'pwd123' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'css=[type=submit] >> text=Cadastrar'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Notice should be
Set Variable
kw.msg: ${element} = css=.notice p
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=.notice p at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: Text: 'Oops! Já existe uma conta com o e-mail informado.'
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.arg: Oops! Já existe uma conta com o e-mail informado.

kw.name: Take Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current window or element and saves it to disk.

suite.doc: Cenário de testes do cadastro de usuários
